'''Bullkey''' was a member of the [[Brommstaad Mercenaries|Brommstaad boys]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], he was ordered by [[Grobber]] to escort [[Maranne Darmic]] and [[Riij Winward]] back to [[Zekka Thyne]]'s fortress, along with [[Promk]] and [[Selty]]. He was rendered unconscious by [[Rathe Palror]] before he could complete the task.<ref name="Side Trip" />
